name: sugar_deacetylation_normalization
notes: Normalize O-acetylated sugar leaves to the corresponding free sugar core. Use only for bridge-closed evaluation until a mapped SMARTS is separately validated.

name: silyl_sugar_deprotection_normalization
notes: Normalize silyl-protected sugar leaves to the corresponding free sugar core. Kept separate because silyl artifacts often come from USPTO protecting-group routes.

name: rhamnosyl_hexose_disaccharide_bridge
notes: Treat recurring non-aromatic rhamnosyl-hexose leaves as bridgeable disaccharide cores without assigning strict buyability or exact linkage unless externally verified.

name: activated_glycosyl_donor_surrogate
notes: Future mapped template family for converting neutral sugar fragments to activated glycosyl donor surrogates. Not currently used by MCTS.

name: disaccharide_to_monosaccharide_core_bridge
notes: Future template family for decomposing rutinose/neohesperidose-like cores to rhamnose and glucose-like monosaccharides. Disabled until linkage-specific SMARTS are validated.
